# This data file generated by 23andMe at: Tue Jan 14 2025 12:00:00 GMT-0800
#
# Synthetic fixture for tests/backend/test_sex_inference.py and
# tests/backend/test_validate_sex_thresholds.py — 23andMe MALE (issue #504).
# NEVER copied from a real export; every genotype is hand-fabricated to
# exercise the hemizygous single-character non-PAR chrX representation that
# 23andMe emits for males (one X copy), which AncestryDNA instead pads to a
# diploid homozygote. Densities clear the issue-#363 minimum-evidence floors
# (>=100 non-PAR chrX, >=50 chrY) so the Plan §9.4 tree runs and confirms XY.
#
# This file contains raw genotype data. Positions are on the GRCh37 (build 37)
# human reference assembly. Fields are TAB-separated. Each line corresponds to
# a single SNP: identifier, chromosome, position, and the genotype call.
# More information on reference human assembly builds:
# https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/assembly/GCF_000001405.13/
# rsid	chromosome	position	genotype
